meta.question: Which of the organization's models contain parallel gateways? (Organization ID: 2dafb1f0acb24b27ae8f0dc47d14fcaa)
meta.finalAnswer: None of the models belonging to the organization with ID 2dafb1f0acb24b27ae8f0dc47d14fcaa (Org18) contain any parallel gateways. The gateways identified in these models are exclusively ExclusiveGateways and EventBasedGateways.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?model ?modelName
WHERE {
  ?org a bboExt:Organization ;
       tai:organizationId "2dafb1f0acb24b27ae8f0dc47d14fcaa" .
  ?model tai:belongsTo ?org ;
         bbo:name ?modelName .
  ?def tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?def .
  ?gateway a bboExt:ParallelGateway ;
           tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The initial query returned no results, possibly due to the assumed hierarchy or the way the organization is linked to the model. I will explore the structure of the organization and its models to verify the hierarchy.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?org ?model ?modelName ?prop ?val
WHERE {
  ?org a bboExt:Organization .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?org), "2dafb1f0acb24b27ae8f0dc47d14fcaa"))
  ?model tai:belongsTo ?org ;
         bbo:name ?modelName .
  ?model ?prop ?val .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The previous query failed to find the organization by ID. I will search for the organization using the ID as a string property to verify its existence and correct URI.

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?model ?modelName ?element
WHERE {
  ?model tai:belongsTo <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/organization/Org18> ;
         bbo:name ?modelName .
  ?def tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?def .
  ?element tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?element a ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?type)), "gateway"))
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?modelName ?type
WHERE {
  ?model tai:belongsTo <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/organization/Org18> ;
         bbo:name ?modelName .
  ?def tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?def .
  ?element tai:belongsTo ?choreo ;
           a ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?type)), "gateway"))
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: The exploration confirmed that none of the models belonging to the specified organization (Org18) contain any ParallelGateways. The models only contain ExclusiveGateways and EventBasedGateways.
